zh.lifeSummary: 當Grace Colley於1566年9月1日出生在英國英格蘭賀特福爾阿爾德波利時，她的父親John Cowley19歲，母親Joan Bridg25歲。她於1579年9月20日與Robert Beach在英國英格蘭賀特福爾聖 阿爾班斯結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。她去世於1665年在英國英格蘭戴文享年99歲。

nameMeanings.name: Colley
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (West Midlands and Yorkshire): variant of   Coley  .
Irish (Dublin) and Scottish: possibly a shortened and altered form of   McCullough   or   McCulloch  .
Americanized form of Swiss German   Kohli  .

variants.name: Coley
meanings: English (Midlands): nickname for a swarthy person, from Middle English coly ‘coaly, coal-black’. The original short vowel is retained in the 16th century colly ‘dirtied with coal and soot’. Alternatively, a variant of Cowley .
Probably an Americanized form of Swiss German   Kohli   or   Kohler  .

nameMeanings.name: Grace
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From the abstract noun (via Old French, from Latin gratia), this name occurs occasionally in the 15th century, and by the 1540s was among the most popular girls' names in some parishes. It has always been particularly popular in Scotland and northern England (borne, for example, by Grace Darling , the lighthouse keeper's daughter whose heroism in 1838 , saving sailors in a storm, caught the popular imagination). In more recent times it was famous as the name of the actress Grace Kelly ( 1928–82 ), who became Princess Grace of Monaco. In Ireland it is used as an Anglicized form of Gráinne .

en.lifeSummary: When Grace Colley was born on 1 September 1566, in Aldbury, Hertfordshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, John Cowley, was 19 and her mother, Joan Bridg, was 25. She married Robert Beach on 20 September 1579, in St Albans, Hertfordshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter. She died in 1665, in Devon, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 99.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Grace Colley est née le 1 septembre 1566, à Aldbury, Hertfordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, John Cowley, avait 19 ans et sa mère, Joan Bridg, avait 25 ans. Elle a épousé Robert Beach le 20 septembre 1579, à St Albans, Hertfordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fille. Elle est décédée en 1665, à Devon, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 99 ans.

September 1579 in St Albans, Hertfordshire, England, United Kingdom Robert Beach geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1665 im Alter von 99 Jahren in Devon, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Grace Colley è nata il il 1 settembre 1566 nel Aldbury, Hertfordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, John Cowley, aveva 19 anni e sua madre, Joan Bridg, aveva 25 anni. Lei sposato Robert Beach il 20 settembre 1579, nel St Albans, Hertfordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlia. Morì nel 1665, nel Devon, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 99 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Grace Colleyが1566年9月1日にイギリスイギリスハートフォードシュアイアアルドブリーで生まれた時，父John Cowleyは19歳，母Joan Bridgは25歳であった。1579年9月20日にイギリスイギリスハートフォードシュアイアスト アルバンスでRobert Beachと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1665年にイギリスイギリスデボンで99歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Grace Colley(이)가 1566년 9월 1일 영국 잉글랜드 허트퍼드실르 알드버이에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John Cowley(은)는 19세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Joan Bridg(은)는 25세였다. 그녀는 1579년 9월 20일 영국 잉글랜드 허트퍼드실르 스트 알반스에서 Robert Beach(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1665년 영국 잉글랜드 데폰에서 99세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Grace Colley nasceu em 1 de setembro de 1566, em Aldbury, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, John Cowley, tinha 19 anos e sua mãe, Joan Bridg, tinha 25 anos. Ela casou-se com Robert Beach em 20 de setembro de 1579, em St Albans, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 1665, em Devon, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 99 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Grace Colley родилась 1 сентября 1566 г. в местности алдбури, хиртфордшир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени John Cowley было 19 лет, а матери, которую звали Joan Bridg, 25. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Robert Beach 20 сентября 1579 г. в местности ст албанс, хиртфордшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них была по крайней мере 1 дочь. Она умерла в 1665 г. в местности девон, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 99 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Grace Colley nació el 1 de septiembre de 1566, en Aldbury, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, John Cowley, tenía 19 años y su mamá, Joan Bridg, tenía 25 años. Se casó con Robert Beach el 20 de septiembre de 1579, en St Albans, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hija. Murió en 1665, en Devon, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 99 años.
